name: PetPal
description: PetPal is a comprehensive digital assistant designed for pet owners to manage their pets' health, wellness, and daily activities. It serves as a centralized hub where users can track medical history, monitor daily habits, and engage in gamified challenges to ensure their pets stay healthy and active. The application uses a playful, user-friendly interface with features like "AI Health Tracking" and a dedicated "Diseases Information" database.
features: AI Health & Wellness Tracker: Log daily care activities such as food, exercise, vet visits, and vaccinations with date/time and notes
Automated Reminders: Notifies owners of upcoming critical events
Multi-Pet Profile Management: Create and manage multiple pets, switch the active pet
Pet Profile Editor: Update pet name, breed, age, and photo through a focused popup
Vet Records Vault: Store vet records with notes and optional file uploads (PDF/image).
Medication Scheduler & Adherence: Add medication plans with dosage, frequency
Smart Health Timeline: View recent care events & health signals in timeline feed for active pet
Pet Symptom Checker: Select symptoms & receive assessment, possible conditions.
Emergency Vet Finder: Save your location, use GPS, & open nearby 24/7 emergency vet search
Disease Information Library: Browse detailed dog and cat disease information, including symptoms, diagnosis, treatment, & prevention
Vaccination Planner: Review dog and cat vaccination schedules and planning notes
